data.body: STATUS 2026-07-12 (/rebar-implement): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED locally as 2e99d189e on branch epic/9d50-calibration-followup (worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-epic-9d50), part of an 8-commit stack. Locally green: pre-commit make lint + make typecheck passed; code leaves validated under held-out TDD (RED-first, implementer held out from the edge oracle, restored full oracle green, mutation/teeth check). NOT yet pushed to Gerrit and NOT closed. REMAINING: push the stack to gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main, get LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, then transition e1f2-0bcc-dbe7-4750 in_progress closed (completion-verifier close gate runs). Do NOT close before this change's Gerrit Verified +1 (per CLAUDE.local.md).
